Scientists from UFPR are included in the list of top researchers in the world

media
Science-wide author database
Published

October 22, 2023

The Federal University of Paraná has 22 researchers listed in the 5th edition of the Updated science-wide author databases of standardized citation indicators, from Elsevier, related to the International Impact Ranking. The research includes the most influential scientists in the world in various areas of knowledge.

The ranking is divided into two categories - impact of research throughout the career or specific to previous years. Released at the beginning of October, the survey analyzes the authors’ performance through data from Scopus, recognized as one of the most important global repositories of abstracts and peer-reviewed scientific citations. Glad to be in both categories (at least for now).

“Luiz Eduardo S. Oliveira, 2024”
